Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dave's amnesia lets the boys skip school for skiing in 'Dave Rebooted', then in 'Germs', ,Theodore fears germs after a school talk.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Squidward is sick, and SpongeBob worries that he has caught it too in 'Squiditis', then in 'Demolition Doofus', SpongeBob's bad driving makes him the star of the demolition derby.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Gary is hoping to enjoy some tasty snail snacks that SpongeBob has brought home in 'Treats!', and then in 'For Here Or To Go?', Plankton wins a free Krabby Patty, but Mr Krabs won't hand it over.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Campers meet a group of naked mole rats in 'The Wisdom of the Naked Mole Rats', then in 'Doommates', Boog and Elliot's friendship hits the rocks.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The arrival of a police dog coincides with theft from the Pet Palace in 'Duty Calls', then in 'Finding Dinkleman', Dinkelman goes missing.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Alvin takes Simon's place on a camping trip in 'Excavation Vacation', and in 'Trophy Dad', The Chipmunks suspect Dave is lying about the various awards he's won.

Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Brittany hastily enters a skateboard contest in 'Skater Girl', then in 'All Washed Up', Simon's robot Geizmo goes around town dismantling washing machines, but is he actually helping.

Nicktoons.uk.desc: Squidward is sick, and SpongeBob worries that he has caught it too in 'Squiditis', then in 'Demolition Doofus', SpongeBob's bad driving makes him the star of the demolition derby.

Nicktoons.uk.desc: Gary is hoping to enjoy some tasty snail snacks that SpongeBob has brought home in 'Treats!', and then in 'For Here Or To Go?', Plankton wins a free Krabby Patty, but Mr Krabs won't hand it over.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Boog and Elliot open up a hair salon in 'Shear Audacity', then in 'Karlita's Way', Karla is forced to reveal her greatest talent and shame.
